deterministic_scorers: section compliance, manifest keyword recall/precision, minimal fix actionability, SOTA JSON integrity, internal benchmark infra checks
self_evaluation_bias_note: sonnet/fable may be both candidate mosaics and judges; LLM judge scores are separate from deterministic scores and judge config changes require a new benchmark version.
